creator: roberth.sjonoy@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD lacks support for the USB Audio 2.0 standards. This is a widely used standard for usb soundcards. And are adopted more and more by manufacturers that produce usb soundcards aimed at audiophiles.

http://www.usb.org/developers/devclass_docs/Audio2.0_final.zip

Fix: 

Inmplement USB audio 2.0 class, into the existing snd_uaudio driver or create new one.
How-To-Repeat: Plug in an usb audio 2.0 card into the computer and demsg will show this:

uaudio_mixer_fill_info: found AC header, vers=200, len=18431
uaudio_mixer_fill_info: invalid audio version
uaudio_attach: audio rev 2.00
uaudio_attach: 0 mixer controls
uaudio0: No playback.
uaudio0: No recording.
uaudio0: No midi sequencer.
uaudio_attach: doing child a
